code:
import io
import string

mut total = 0
mut eof = false
while not eof
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    match parse_second(line)
    when Some(v)
      total = total + v
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    eof = true
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn skip_ws(_ line: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = start
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  i
end

fn skip_token(_ line: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = start
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        done = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  i
end

fn parse_second(_ line: String) -> Option<Int>
  let a = skip_ws(line, 0)
  let b = skip_token(line, a)
  let c = skip_ws(line, b)
  let d = skip_token(line, c)
  if c == d
    None
  else
    string.parse_int(string.substring(line, c, d))
  end
end
